PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); $n = Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($n\){ Write-Output "node: $\($n.Source\)"; node -v; npm -v } else { Write-Output "still-not-found"; @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:APPDATA\\npm"\) | ForEach-Object { if\(Test-Path $_\){ Write-Output "EXISTS: $_" } } })

PowerShell($edge = "${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe"; $args = @\("--headless=new","--disable-gpu","--no-sandbox","--window-size=1600,1000","--screenshot=d:\\erp\\dashboard\\_calls.png","--virtual-time-budget=9000","--user-data-dir=$env:TEMP\\edgecall","http://localhost:5173"\); $p = Start-Process -FilePath $edge -ArgumentList $args -NoNewWindow -PassThru; $p.WaitForExit\(15000\) | Out-Null; if\(-not $p.HasExited\){ $p.Kill\(\) }; Get-Item d:\\erp\\dashboard\\_calls.png | Select-Object Length)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $d = \(Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5173/api/calls?days=7" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $d.series | ForEach-Object { "  $\($_.label\): $\($_.total\)건 \(max $\($_.max\)\)" } } catch { "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($edge = "${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe"; $args = @\("--headless=new","--disable-gpu","--no-sandbox","--window-size=1600,1400","--screenshot=d:\\erp\\dashboard\\_cspage.png","--virtual-time-budget=9000","--user-data-dir=$env:TEMP\\edgecsp","http://localhost:5173"\); $p = Start-Process -FilePath $edge -ArgumentList $args -NoNewWindow -PassThru; $p.WaitForExit\(15000\) | Out-Null; if\(-not $p.HasExited\){ $p.Kill\(\) }; Get-Item d:\\erp\\dashboard\\_cspage.png | Select-Object Length)

PowerShell($edge = "${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe"; $args = @\("--headless=new","--disable-gpu","--no-sandbox","--window-size=1500,950","--screenshot=d:\\erp\\dashboard\\_pb.png","--virtual-time-budget=8000","--user-data-dir=$env:TEMP\\edgepb","http://localhost:5173"\); $p = Start-Process -FilePath $edge -ArgumentList $args -NoNewWindow -PassThru; $p.WaitForExit\(15000\) | Out-Null; if\(-not $p.HasExited\){ $p.Kill\(\) }; Get-Item d:\\erp\\dashboard\\_pb.png | Select-Object Length)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; foreach\($dys in 1,7\){ try { $d = \(Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5173/api/calls?days=$dys" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $all = $d.series | Where-Object { $_.id -eq 'all' }; "days=$dys → 전체 $\($all.total\)건"; if\($dys -eq 1\){ for\($wd=0;$wd -lt 7;$wd++\){ $rowsum=\($all.grid[$wd] | Measure-Object -Sum\).Sum; if\($rowsum -gt 0\){ $wdn=@\('일','월','화','수','목','금','토'\)[$wd]; "   $wdn 요일 합 $rowsum" } } } } catch { "ERR days=$dys : $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; foreach\($dys in 1,7\){ try { $d = \(Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5173/api/calls?days=$dys" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $g=@{}; $d.series | ForEach-Object { $g[$_.id]=$_.total }; "days=$dys → 전체 $\($g.all\) \(전화 $\($g.phone\)/채팅 $\($g.chat\)\) | 다인 $\($g.dain\) + 아무도 $\($g.amudo\) = $\($g.dain + $g.amudo\)" } catch { "ERR days=$dys" } })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; foreach\($dys in 1,7\){ try { $d = \(Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5173/api/calls?days=$dys" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $g=@{}; $d.series | ForEach-Object { $g[$_.id]=$_.total }; $rest=$g.all - $g.dain - $g.amudo; "days=$dys → 전체 $\($g.all\) | 다인 $\($g.dain\) + 아무도 $\($g.amudo\) + 미분류 $rest" } catch { "ERR days=$dys" } })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $d = \(Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5173/api/calls?days=7" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; \($d.series | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.label\)=$\($_.total\)" }\) -join "  "; } catch { "ERR" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; foreach\($dys in 1,7\){ try { $d = \(Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5173/api/calls?days=$dys" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; \("days=$dys → " + \(\($d.series | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.label\) $\($_.total\)" }\) -join " / "\)\) } catch { "ERR days=$dys" } })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $d = \(Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5173/api/calls?days=7" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $etc = $d.series | Where-Object { $_.id -eq 'etc' }; "미분류 $\($etc.total\)건, items $\($etc.items.Count\)개 — 샘플:"; $etc.items | Select-Object -First 4 | ForEach-Object { "   [$\($_.medium\)] $\($_.name\)  \($\($_.tags\)\)" } } catch { "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(foreach\($i in 1,2\){ $sw=[System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch]::StartNew\(\); try { $d=\(Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5173/api/calls?days=1" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 90\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $sw.Stop\(\); "호출$i : ${\($sw.ElapsedMilliseconds\)}ms, updatedAt=$\($d.updatedAt\), 전체=$\(\($d.series|?{$_.id -eq 'all'}\).total\)" } catch { $sw.Stop\(\); "호출$i 실패 ${\($sw.ElapsedMilliseconds\)}ms: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell(try { $a=\(Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5173" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8\).StatusCode; "dev\(5173\): HTTP $a" } catch { "dev DOWN: $_" }; try { $b=\(Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:8787/api/cs" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15\).StatusCode; "bff\(8787\): HTTP $b" } catch { "bff DOWN: $_" })

PowerShell($edge = "${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe"; $args = @\("--headless=new","--disable-gpu","--no-sandbox","--window-size=1600,1500","--screenshot=d:\\erp\\dashboard\\_io.png","--virtual-time-budget=9000","--user-data-dir=$env:TEMP\\edgeio","http://localhost:5173"\); $p = Start-Process -FilePath $edge -ArgumentList $args -NoNewWindow -PassThru; $p.WaitForExit\(15000\) | Out-Null; if\(-not $p.HasExited\){ $p.Kill\(\) }; Get-Item d:\\erp\\dashboard\\_io.png | Select-Object Length)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $d = \(Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5173/api/calls?days=1" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; "오늘: " + \(\($d.series | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.label\) $\($_.total\)" }\) -join " / "\) + "  \(채널톡: 전체17/전화11/채팅6\)" } catch { "ERR" })

PowerShell(try { $d = \(Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5173/api/calls?days=1" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $p = $d.series | Where-Object { $_.id -eq 'phone' }; $a = $d.series | Where-Object { $_.id -eq 'all' }; "지금 /api/calls → 전체 $\($a.total\) / 전화 $\($p.total\)  \(방금 전수조사: 전체18/전화12\)" } catch { "ERR" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $root = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:8787/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; $isHtml = $root.Content -match "<div id=`"root`""; "8787 / → HTTP $\($root.StatusCode\), index.html 서빙: $isHtml" } catch { "root ERR: $_" }; try { $api = \(Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:8787/api/cs" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15\).StatusCode; "8787 /api/cs → HTTP $api" } catch { "api ERR: $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; try { $d = \(Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5173/api/calls?days=1" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 120\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; "오늘\(통화단위\): " + \(\($d.series | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.label\) $\($_.total\)" }\) -join " / "\) } catch { "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
PowerShell("stopped all node")
PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5173/api/cs" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15\).StatusCode | ForEach-Object { "dev+bff OK: $_" } } catch { "ERR: $_" })
